# NourNest — short-let management & curated guest experience for London properties

NourNest Ltd (company 16629708, registered England & Wales) is a London-based short-let property management business. Director-led by Gerda Micke. Independently run — not a franchise, not a platform.

## What NourNest does

- **Short-let apartment bookings (B2C)**: 49 hand-picked apartments across central and greater London, available to book direct or via major platforms. Stays from 3 nights to 3 months.
- **Property management (B2B)**: full-service short-let management for London landlords. 17-20% management fee, retainer-based, no kickbacks on works.
- **Private Residences (UHNW B2B)**: director-led stewardship for London homes that are not for the open market. NDA-standard discretion, by appointment only.

## Locations

26 London neighbourhoods including Mayfair, Shoreditch, Kensington, Marylebone, Maida Vale, Hoxton, Crouch End, Hammersmith, Pimlico, Battersea, London Bridge, Farringdon, Old Street, Hackney, Tower Hill, Russell Square, Aldgate, Holloway, Kilburn, Maida Vale, Queens Park.

## Key links

- Apartments: https://nournestapartments.com/listings/
- Property management: https://nournestapartments.com/property-management/
- Private Residences: https://nournestapartments.com/private-residences/
- Booking system (powered by BOOM): https://nournestapartments.bookingsboom.com/
- Contact: hello@nournestapartments.com · +44 7802 666 672

## Brand voice

Warm, considered, quietly premium. Never sales-y. UK spelling.
